statements.sql: select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` = 1 and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\Admin'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` = 1 and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\Admin'
select * from `section_data` where `theme` = 1 and `key` = 'privacy policy.content' limit 1

update `section_data` set `data` = '{\"Title\":\"Privacy Policy\",\"Privacy_Policy\":\"

At Blame Trading Management<\/b>, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use our platform.<\/p>

1. Information We Collect<\/strong><\/h3>

We may collect the following types of information:<\/p>

  • Personal Information<\/strong> (Name, Email, Phone Number, etc.)<\/li>
  • Financial Information<\/strong> (Transaction Details, Payment Methods)<\/li>
  • Usage Data<\/strong> (IP Address, Browser Type, Device Information)<\/li><\/ul>

    2. How We Use Your Information<\/strong><\/h3>

    We use your data to:<\/p>

    • Provide and improve our services<\/li>
    • Process transactions and withdrawals<\/li>
    • Enhance security and prevent fraud<\/li>
    • Send important updates and promotional offers<\/li><\/ul>

      3. Data Security<\/strong><\/h3>

      We implement verified security<\/strong> measures, including encryption and secure servers, to protect your personal and financial data from unauthorized access.<\/p>

      4. Sharing of Information<\/strong><\/h3>

      We do not<\/strong> sell or rent your personal information. However, we may share it with:<\/p>

      • Regulatory authorities if required by law<\/li>
      • Trusted third-party service providers for payment processing and security<\/li><\/ul>

        5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies<\/strong><\/h3>

        We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze site traffic. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.<\/p>

        6. Your Rights<\/strong><\/h3>

        You have the right to:<\/p>

        • Access, update, or delete your personal information<\/li>
        • Opt out of marketing communications<\/li>
        • Request details on how your data is used<\/li><\/ul>

          7. Changes to This Policy<\/strong><\/h3>

          We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and we encourage you to review it periodically.<\/p>

          8. Contact Us<\/strong><\/h3>

          For any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@blametradingmanagements.com<\/b><\/p>\"}', `section_data`.`updated_at` = '2025-02-28 03:43:38' where `id` = 37
